_README: DDB characterIds for the Ashfall Britannia party. The four below were recovered from the exported PDF filenames in '03-Characters/01 PCs/Party Character Sheets/' (pattern <ddb-username>_<characterId>.pdf). The 'name' field is only a fallback label — ddb_party_sync.js names its output files after the REAL character name from each fetched sheet, so once authenticated you'll get proper PC names automatically. Samothy's PDF has no ID in its filename; fill in characterId from dndbeyond.com/characters/<id>. Sheets must be Public or Campaign-Only; add DDB_COBALT to .env to fetch Campaign-Only ones (all four currently are).

characters.name: Flux
characters._note: ID recovered from the DDB campaign roster (Flux.md/Dashboard had it blank)
